text_template: Warning, if you're still using a sportsbook to bet on the finals, you're getting robbed. Delete that app and join the millions using Polymarket. Polymarket is a prediction market, not a sportsbook. You trade against other fans, not the house. That's more money for you and less for greedy sportsbooks. Available in all 50 states. Polymarket, your go-to prediction market for basketball's biggest stage. Download Polymarket and use promo code FIELD to unlock $50 free for your first trade. Trading not available in all jurisdictions. Check local regulations before trading. Restrictions and Eligibility Requirements Apply.
